emailTemplates.body:
Hi Sarah,

I hope this email finds you well. I'm reaching out regarding AI-powered business automation for Cohen.

Ben Ginati from Tax4Us recently implemented our AI automation and has seen remarkable results. He specifically mentioned that you might be interested in similar solutions for your legal services.

Our platform has helped businesses like Tax4Us achieve:
• 50% reduction in manual tasks
• 3x faster content creation
• Automated customer communication
• Real-time analytics and reporting

Would you be interested in a 15-minute demo to see how we can automate your follow up on ben ginati referral for legal document automation?

Best regards,
Shai Friedman
Rensto - AI Business Automation
